mapper.select: select * from user_notification_setting where user_id = #{userId} limit 1
select * from user_widget_setting where user_id = #{userId} limit 1
select * from user_appearance_setting where user_id = #{userId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into user_notification_setting ( user_id, mobile_push_enabled, desktop_notice_enabled, team_remind_enabled, system_announcement_enabled ) values ( #{userId}, #{mobilePushEnabled}, #{desktopNoticeEnabled}, #{teamRemindEnabled}, #{systemAnnouncementEnabled} )

insert into user_widget_setting ( user_id, auto_start_flag, always_on_top_flag, show_plan_flag, show_timer_flag, show_memo_flag ) values ( #{userId}, #{autoStartFlag}, #{alwaysOnTopFlag}, #{showPlanFlag}, #{showTimerFlag}, #{showMemoFlag} )
mapper.update: update user_widget_setting set auto_start_flag = #{autoStartFlag}, always_on_top_flag = #{alwaysOnTopFlag}, show_plan_flag = #{showPlanFlag}, show_timer_flag = #{showTimerFlag}, show_memo_flag = #{showMemoFlag} where user_id = #{userId}
